headline: Built for 6sense
subheadline: AI-powered talent acquisition infrastructure to streamline hiring in APAC for your ABM platform

challenges.title: Talent Shortages in APAC
challenges.desc: 6sense faces competition for skilled professionals in India and Singapore. Your workforce of 768 has declined by 3.3% YoY, making retention harder. This impacts your ability to support ABM platform operations across 14 countries.

challenges.title: Employee Retention
challenges.desc: With a 3.3% YoY decline in staff, 6sense struggles to maintain expertise in predictive analytics. This affects demand generation and sales workflows. Recruiting in competitive tech markets adds pressure on talent acquisition teams.

challenges.title: ABM Pipeline Management
challenges.desc: 6sense's ABM platform relies on intent data and predictive models, but integrating these with workflows is complex. Recent funding rounds highlight the need for efficient revenue conversion. Employee reductions slow down account identification efforts.

challenges.title: AI Integration
challenges.desc: 6sense uses AI for sales and marketing, but scaling it amid a declining workforce is challenging. Operations in multiple countries require seamless data enrichment. This can lead to gaps in audience building and conversational email strategies.

deliverables.title: AI Hiring Optimizer
deliverables.desc: Builds a system to predict and source top talent in APAC, integrating with your HR tools for faster recruitment

deliverables.title: ABM Workflow Enhancer
deliverables.desc: Creates automated workflows for account identification and intent data, linking with your existing sales platforms to boost pipeline conversion

deliverables.title: Revenue Prediction System
deliverables.desc: Develops predictive models for revenue forecasting, integrating with 6sense's data enrichment tools to refine marketing strategies

deliverables.title: Talent Retention Tracker
deliverables.desc: Constructs a monitoring system to track employee engagement and retention metrics, connecting with your internal databases to address YoY declines

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Analyze 6sense's current talent and sales infrastructure needs based on your APAC operations and employee data.

engagementSteps.title: System Design
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Design AI-driven solutions tailored to your ABM platform, incorporating predictive analytics for hiring and revenue.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Launch
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems with your existing tools and launch for immediate use in APAC markets.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to optimize sales processes like talent acquisition and pipeline management for B2B SaaS companies.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with 6sense?
faqItems.answer: The system links with your ABM tools for seamless data flow and workflow enhancements.

faqItems.question: Is this customized for APAC?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it focuses on regions like India and Singapore to address your specific talent needs.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope, but we base them on your $155M revenue scale for affordability.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months, aligned with our engagement steps for quick results.

faqItems.question: Can it handle employee declines?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it includes retention tracking to mitigate issues like your 3.3% YoY staff reduction.

stackItems.name: 6AI
stackItems.role: Handles predictive modeling for sales and hiring decisions

stackItems.name: Intent Data Tool
stackItems.role: Monitors buyer intent to enhance ABM strategies

stackItems.name: CRM Integration
stackItems.role: Connects with sales platforms for data enrichment and workflows

stackItems.name: Predictive Analytics
stackItems.role: Analyzes trends to forecast revenue and talent needs

stackItems.name: Workflow Orchestrator
stackItems.role: Automates tasks in marketing and sales operations
